inputs.label: Total Food Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total amount of food prepared or produced in the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total amount of food prepared or produced in the period.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönem içinde hazırlanan veya üretilen toplam gıda miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtmenge der im Zeitraum zubereiteten oder produzierten Lebensmittel.

inputs.label: Total Food Wasted
inputs.businessContext: Total food discarded or not consumed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total food discarded or not consumed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Atılan veya tüketilmeyen toplam gıda miktarı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte entsorgte oder nicht verzehrte Lebensmittel.

inputs.label: Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of food ingredients per kilogram.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost of food ingredients per kilogram.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gıda bileşenlerinin kilogram başına ortalama maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Kosten der Lebensmittelzutaten pro Kilogramm.

inputs.label: Meals Served
inputs.businessContext: Number of meals served from the produced food.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of meals served from the produced food.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üretilen gıdadan servis edilen öğün sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der aus den produzierten Lebensmitteln servierten Mahlzeiten.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
